title: AngrySlingshot
description: Mod adds Angry Birds like slingshot to the game!
body:
###   <center>![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ad488cdc9490b93ef7269108a9d340519ac9033.png)</center>
<center>AngrySlingshot - This is mod that adds AngryBirds like slingshot in game.</center>

  #

### <center>![2 types of slingshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36dc16f60ea86cf0aacc8eedb97a85317820b705.png)</center>
# <center>![https://i.imgur.com/uts9MEk.gif](https://i.imgur.com/uts9MEk.gif)</center>

### ![Default Slingshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3e57237dfaa7f6dcea6a04cbc0e76055e028866.png)
### <center>![https://i.imgur.com/XzOsPi2.gif](https://i.imgur.com/XzOsPi2.gif)</center>
- 4sec cooldown
- 80 uses

### ![Reinforced Slingshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c6a0201731b472263af93d283a08eab6621a75f.png)
### <center>![https://i.imgur.com/DLBRnRo.gif](https://i.imgur.com/DLBRnRo.gif)</center>
- 2sec cooldown
- 210 uses
# 

### ![3 types of birds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b050422bea643fc539a5b8084381cb30fe0e98ce.png)
### <center>![https://i.imgur.com/OFxCyny.gif](https://i.imgur.com/OFxCyny.gif)</center>

### ![RED](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9beb9376c2e3c6549f858842770b65d93f098abd.png)
### <center>![https://i.imgur.com/812uGO4.gif](https://i.imgur.com/812uGO4.gif)</center>
- Default

### ![Yellow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d29bbe8e063a8995cb5bbc09bda66161c04dd7a2.png)
### <center> ![https://i.imgur.com/9boFX0D.gif](https://i.imgur.com/9boFX0D.gif)</center>
- Faster and deal more damage 

### <center>![Black](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/951d6f88204609662b6f5bbb8498b3a655fce5f4.png)<center>
### <center>![https://i.imgur.com/XSrTRMW.gif](https://i.imgur.com/XSrTRMW.gif)</center>
- Boom bird. Blows everything up!
# 

### <center>![4 switchable modes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48116a134357ffdce73a34538788f3ef14db25ac.png)</center>
- Random
- Red bird
- Yellow bird
- Black bird
